domain: 高电压钴酸锂技术-验证高电压环境下锂电池性能

subspaces.name: High-Voltage LiCoO₂ Structural Stability
aliases: 高电压钴酸锂结构稳定性
subspaces.description: Mechanisms and quantification of bulk phase transitions (e.g., O3→H1-3, monoclinic distortion) and lattice oxygen loss above 4.5 V vs. Li⁺/Li.
seed_papers: Chen et al., Adv. Energy Mater. 2021, 11, 2003576
subspaces.probe_query: oxygen release layered-to-spinel transformation cation mixing lattice parameter evolution in situ XRD high-voltage structural degradation

subspaces.name: Electrolyte Oxidation at High Voltage
subspaces.description: Thermodynamic and kinetic limits of carbonate-based and emerging electrolytes (e.g., sulfones, fluorinated carbonates) under >4.5 V anodic polarization; radical-mediated oxidation pathways.
subspaces.probe_query: electrolyte oxidation onset oxidative stability window radical cation formation HF generation gas evolution (CO₂, O₂) linear sweep voltammetry

subspaces.name: Cathode–Electrolyte Interphase (CEI) Engineering
subspaces.description: Composition, morphology, and ion-conducting properties of the cathode–electrolyte interphase on LiCoO₂; role in suppressing transition metal dissolution and oxygen redox side reactions.
seed_papers: Zheng et al., ACS Energy Lett. 2019, 4, 1346–1354
Yoon et al., Adv. Funct. Mater. 2021, 31, 2009710
subspaces.probe_query: CEI composition LiF-rich CEI in situ TEM CEI XPS depth profiling electrochemical impedance spectroscopy CEI conductivity

subspaces.name: Surface Reconstruction and Oxygen Redox
subspaces.description: Irreversible surface oxygen loss, transition metal migration, and formation of rock-salt or spinel-like dead layers on LiCoO₂ particles during high-voltage cycling.
subspaces.probe_query: rock-salt reconstruction oxygen dimerization surface TM migration electron energy loss spectroscopy aberration-corrected STEM O K-edge ELNES

subspaces.name: Atomic-Scale Surface Coating
subspaces.description: Ultra-thin, conformal coatings (e.g., Al₂O₃, LiAlO₂, LiPOₓ) applied via ALD or sol-gel to suppress interfacial side reactions and stabilize surface oxygen.
subspaces.probe_query: ALD LiCoO₂ coating thickness control interfacial impedance reduction coating crystallinity coating–substrate adhesion in situ Raman coating stability

subspaces.name: Bulk Doping for Voltage Resilience
subspaces.description: Substitutional doping (e.g., Mg²⁺, Ti⁴⁺, Nb⁵⁺, Al³⁺) into LiCoO₂ lattice to strengthen Co–O bonds, widen bandgap, and inhibit oxygen loss and cation mixing.
seed_papers: Lee et al., Adv. Energy Mater. 2017, 7, 1602782
subspaces.probe_query: doping site occupancy bond covalency modulation XANES Co K-edge doping-induced lattice expansion charge compensation mechanism electronic structure tuning

subspaces.name: Thermal–Electrochemical Coupling at High Voltage
subspaces.description: Exothermic reactions triggered by high-voltage operation — including oxygen release + electrolyte oxidation — and their role in accelerating thermal runaway onset.
seed_papers: Feng et al., J. Electrochem. Soc. 2018, 165, A155–A165
subspaces.probe_query: ARC testing onset temperature of O₂ release heat flow calorimetry gas chromatography–mass spectrometry self-heating rate thermal propagation modeling

subspaces.name: In Situ/Operando Characterization of HV Degradation
subspaces.description: Real-time monitoring techniques (e.g., operando XRD/XAS, differential electrochemical mass spectrometry, synchrotron TXM) to resolve dynamic structural, chemical, and interfacial evolution during high-voltage cycling.
seed_papers: Gao et al., Acc. Chem. Res. 2022, 55, 2221–2234
subspaces.probe_query: operando XAS DEMS synchrotron CEI mapping time-resolved EELS high-frame-rate XRD voltage-resolved spectroscopy

user_interaction.question: Select the subspaces to prioritize before ZhiZhi imports papers. You can also add custom subspaces.

options.label: High-Voltage LiCoO₂ Structural Stability
options.description: Mechanisms and quantification of bulk phase transitions (e.g., O3→H1-3, monoclinic distortion) and lattice oxygen loss above 4.5 V vs. Li⁺/Li.

options.label: Electrolyte Oxidation at High Voltage
options.description: Thermodynamic and kinetic limits of carbonate-based and emerging electrolytes (e.g., sulfones, fluorinated carbonates) under >4.5 V anodic polarization; radical-mediated oxidation pathways.

options.label: Cathode–Electrolyte Interphase (CEI) Engineering
options.description: Composition, morphology, and ion-conducting properties of the cathode–electrolyte interphase on LiCoO₂; role in suppressing transition metal dissolution and oxygen redox side reactions.

options.label: Surface Reconstruction and Oxygen Redox
options.description: Irreversible surface oxygen loss, transition metal migration, and formation of rock-salt or spinel-like dead layers on LiCoO₂ particles during high-voltage cycling.

options.label: Atomic-Scale Surface Coating
options.description: Ultra-thin, conformal coatings (e.g., Al₂O₃, LiAlO₂, LiPOₓ) applied via ALD or sol-gel to suppress interfacial side reactions and stabilize surface oxygen.

options.label: Bulk Doping for Voltage Resilience
options.description: Substitutional doping (e.g., Mg²⁺, Ti⁴⁺, Nb⁵⁺, Al³⁺) into LiCoO₂ lattice to strengthen Co–O bonds, widen bandgap, and inhibit oxygen loss and cation mixing.

options.label: Thermal–Electrochemical Coupling at High Voltage
options.description: Exothermic reactions triggered by high-voltage operation — including oxygen release + electrolyte oxidation — and their role in accelerating thermal runaway onset.

options.label: In Situ/Operando Characterization of HV Degradation
options.description: Real-time monitoring techniques (e.g., operando XRD/XAS, differential electrochemical mass spectrometry, synchrotron TXM) to resolve dynamic structural, chemical, and interfacial evolution during high-voltage cycling.

custom_subspace_input.placeholder: e.g. Demand Response; EV Charging Coordination; Building Energy Management
custom_subspace_input.instructions: If your target subfield is not listed, provide one subspace per line or semicolon-separated. These will be converted into custom retrieval branches.

user_interaction.continue_with: Pass subspace_map_id plus selected_subfields, or pass option labels as focus_branches to run_zhizhi_literature_analysis.
